## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss technical SEO implications of Firework's website transition and address WordPress staging issues.](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Temporary redirect to index.php doesn't affect SEO but impacts branding](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Careful management of redirects is crucial during and after the transition](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [WordPress staging environment is currently experiencing navigation issues](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Content publishing on staging is on hold pending resolution of technical problems](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

## Topics

### Website Transition and SEO Impact

  - [Firework transitioning from WordPress to Webflow, using Nginx reverse proxy](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Temporary solution: redirecting firework.com to firework.com/index.php](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [SEO impact minimal, but branding affected due to visible "index.php" in URL](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Future reversal: need to implement reverse redirect (index.php to firework.com)](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Google will update rankings within \~1 month after redirect changes](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Critical to manage redirects carefully to avoid issues](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### WordPress Staging Environment Issues

  - [Navigation between lists of pages not working properly on staging](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Cache clearing and permalink reset attempts haven't resolved the problem](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [WP Engine's cache described as "relentless"](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Concern about allowing authors to write directly in production environment](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Content Publishing Strategy

  - [10 articles ready for publishing before Monday](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Decision to put new content publishing on hold for a couple of days](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Prateek to check with Carolyn before publishing anything to staging](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Aim to avoid causing additional problems during the transition period](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deric to work with team on potential solution to avoid index.php in URL](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Jorge to forward relevant email about WordPress issues to Carolyn](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Prateek to pause publishing new content to staging until further notice](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Carolyn to investigate and attempt to resolve WordPress staging issues](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Team to implement careful redirect management during and after transition](https://fathom.video/share/unv_tFXSbdEfgc9-LHma-Y6yKbACS_Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
